title: Nth Fibonacci Number
text:
Given N (0 ≤ N ≤ 10⁵), compute the Nth Fibonacci number modulo 10⁹+7. F(0)=0, F(1)=1, F(N)=F(N-1)+F(N-2).

Input format:
N

Output format:
A single integer

Example:
Input:
10

Output:
55
starter_code:
def solve():
    n = int(input())
    MOD = 10**9 + 7
    # Compute F(n) % MOD

solve()
